channel.title: xarticl.es
channel.description: Curated articles on entrepreneurship, finance, health & more.

item.title: AI is a mirror. Here's why you hate what you see:
item.description: Everyone starts prompting the same way. “I don’t know how to write sales copy. I’ll ask AI.” “I’ve never built a financial model. AI will do it.” “I’m not a designer. Let AI handle it.” It feels

item.title: AI is Coming For Your Job
item.description: It’s pretty clear at this point. AI has taken over the world. And what’s crazier than that is how fast it happened. It feels like two seconds ago AI barely existed. Now it’s everywhere. Work. School.

item.title: AI is Corporate Ozempic
item.description: Yesterday, Jack Dorsey cut nearly half of Block's workforce -- over 4,000 people -- and told shareholders exactly why: "A significantly smaller team, using the tools we're building, can do more and do

item.title: AI is the Beginning, Not the End
item.description: The cheaper it gets to create, the harder it is to get people to care. There’s very little middle ground around AI right now. Conversations are either about AI being the end of work or overhyped slop.

item.title: AI Multi-Agent Workflows Change The Game Completely

item.title: AI Will Take Every Job Except One
